resume.summary: Systems Orchestrator and Full-Stack Engineer expert in React, TypeScript, and Node.js; specialized in automating data lifecycles—including a transition from quarterly to real-time sync—to scale enterprise properties for high-traffic environments.

experience.title: Software Developer
desc: Manage and optimize 5+ enterprise digital properties, streamlining database synchronization and updates to ensure data integrity across multi-tenant environments.
Architect and deploy high-conversion user flows and lead capture forms integrated with Salesforce, Prospect, and Genesys, facilitating seamless data ingestion and sales routing.
Design and ship consumer-facing features and reusable UI components, improving page performance and maintaining WCAG compliance and UX consistency across business units.
Iterate on deployment pipelines and Git-based workflows, reducing release friction and ensuring stable, high-velocity delivery in an Agile environment.

experience.title: Web Developer
desc: Architected and deployed custom Node.js APIs to bridge BI platforms (Looker, Tableau) with a headless WordPress CMS, transitioning data updates from manual quarterly cycles to real-time synchronization and ensuring 100% data freshness.

Engineered an interactive WebGL data visualization for the chatbot product, utilizing a high-performance "flying meteor" animation to traverse 1,000+ global coordinates and programmatically display localized engagement metrics from real-time tracking data.

Architected the migration of a high-traffic blog to a headless CMS (React, Gatsby, GraphQL), achieving a 20% reduction in load times and significantly enhancing technical SEO performance and Core Web Vitals.

Collaborated with backend teams to develop and deploy scalable Node.js APIs for seamless data flow, integrating with third-party tools and monetization/user engagement widgets to enhance front-end functionality and web performance across distributed systems, aligning with SEO data exposure requirements.

Mentored a cross-functional team on scalable code design and performance optimizations while serving as the primary technical liaison to translate complex engineering blockers into actionable requirements for non-technical stakeholders (Product and SEO).
Partnered with cross-functional teams (Design, Product) in an Agile environment to translate SEO strategies into scalable engineering solutions.

experience.title: Content Marketing Coordinator
desc: Developed internal tools and automated workflows by building a Node.js application integrated with Google APIs, reducing manual effort by 10x and accelerating delivery timelines for content-related initiatives by more than 50%, thereby improving SEO processes and content optimization.

Streamlined content quality assurance, reducing broken links by 30% and duplicate content by 25%, by auditing pages using browser developer tools for frontend validation and developing custom Python and Node.js scripts to automate site-wide integrity checks and SEO audits, enhancing observability of content health.

Partnered with E-Commerce and Technical SEO teams to support website functionality QA testing, ensuring proper instrumentation for tracking, performance analysis, and SEO critical metrics monitoring using logging and dashboards.

experience.title: Resident Analyst
desc: Designed business logic and extracted key data elements from B2B client databases, enabling data-driven insights to improve customer personalization and engagement metrics.
Developed automation workflows and implemented responsive landing pages and templates using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.
Improved customer engagement by transforming user requirements into digital initiatives, including responsive CRM integrations and data migrations.
